Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1500 "SUPERDOGFIGHT-1000-1500" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Super Dogfight (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 which copies 256 bytes of data from $1020 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400.
